title: oenothera hartwegii var. filifolia
intro: Oenothera hartwegii var. filifolia, also known as California evening primrose or evening star, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. The roots and leaves of Oenothera hartwegii var. filifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
